description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding cabinet or shelf unit with a modern, minimalist design. The front features a combination of open shelving on the right and a two-panel door on the left, with a visible handle for access. The shelving section is composed of four evenly spaced shelves, ideal for storing books, decor, or other items. The cabinet's exterior is finished in a light wood grain, while the back panel has a distinct, textured particle board appearance. The overall construction appears to be primarily engineered wood, with some metal hardware for the handle and hinges. The object is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or residential entryways.
description: A modern, freestanding cabinet with open shelves on one side and a two-panel door with a handle on the other, finished in light wood grain and particle board.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves on the right and a two-panel door with a handle on the left.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, light wood grain surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a textured particle board back panel with a vertical seam.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood grain surface.
